hooks.command: python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo '---' && python -m ruff check src/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -20

Stop.command: bash -c 'chars=$(wc -c < CLAUDE.md); if [ "$chars" -gt 25000 ]; then echo "CLAUDE.md is ${chars} chars — exceeds 25,000 char ceiling. Move operator reference content to docs/development/operator_reference.md before proceeding."; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f scripts/_gitignore_audit.py ]; then python scripts/_gitignore_audit.py || exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "artifact_kind" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo "artifact_kind found in changed files — use artifact_type instead (constitution invariant)"; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f scripts/_pre_pr_rollback_check.py ]; then python scripts/_pre_pr_rollback_check.py || exit 1; fi'
